_doc: §19 item 3 — curated EXTERNAL reference-class priors, keyed by the LEAF bucket `role|mechType|direction|side` (tuningProfile leaf; side is yes/no). Each entry: payGivenFail / payGivenWin = the conditional base rates read from decades of REAL-WORLD history (not market settlements, not an LLM guess); pseudoSamples = how many independent historical episodes back it (scales the optimizer's conservatism shading); source = the auditable reference-class description (dataset + construction). CURATION RULES (docs/causal-hedge-without-settlement-data.md §2.4/§5): mechanism-first (never a top-k correlation scan), stable across time windows, multiple reference-class constructions averaged, Laplace 1/(n+2) for zero cells, and a per-bucket transportability judgment — leaf-only, no fallback-rung inheritance. Empty by design until data is curated: the loader is a no-op without entries. Example shape (NOT a real prior): {"cross_domain|causal|negative|yes": {"payGivenFail": 0.42, "payGivenWin": 0.18, "pseudoSamples": 24, "source": "1974-2024 <dataset>: <reference-class construction>"}}
